message: docs: mention podcast support on site

files.patch:
@@ -34,6 +34,7 @@

Modes & knobs.

Website YouTube + Podcasts Extract

@@ -43,6 +43,8 @@

Docs

Website mode

Fetch HTML → extract “article-ish” content → normalize to clean text. If extraction looks blocked or too thin, retry via Firecrawl Markdown (optional). With --format md, the CLI prefers Firecrawl Markdown when configured and can also convert HTML → Markdown via --markdown-mode (LLM) or uvx markitdown.

+

Podcast pages are supported (Apple Podcasts, Spotify episodes, RSS feeds, Podbean, Podchaser, embedded YouTube). Summaries use published transcripts when available, otherwise Whisper.

+

Flags

  • --firecrawl off|auto|always

@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@

Link → clean text → summary.

Website extraction YouTube transcripts + Podcast compatibility JSON + metrics
@@ -97,6 +98,11 @@

Extraction that’s not naive

HTML → normalized text, with fallbacks when a site fights back.

Cheerio + sanitization + optional Firecrawl
+
+

Podcast-friendly

+

Apple/Spotify/RSS episode pages, plus embedded YouTube podcasts.

+
Prefers published transcripts; Whisper fallback
+

YouTube transcripts, without drama

Pull captions via multiple paths so “missing transcript” becomes rare.
